title: sebastiania corniculata var. patula
intro: Sebastiania corniculata var. patula, also known as the Patula Sebastiania or Patula Sebastiania bush, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sebastiania corniculata var. patula include treating wounds, skin infections, and fever, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures that are used to treat various health conditions.
